daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Viewing Opportunities

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, providing a good chance to view auroras at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Plan to view auroras if you're in high-latitude areas.

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1a | Progress MS-33 Launch
top_events.description: A Soyuz rocket will launch a resupply mission to the ISS.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream of the launch.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-62 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX will launch another batch of Starlink satellites.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live stream for the launch.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
